use_codes.desc: CONTINUED TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH ACUTE MYELOID LEUKEMIA WHO ACHIEVED FIRST COMPLETE REMISSION (CR) OR CR WITH INCOMPLETE BLOOD COUNT RECOVERY FOLLOWING INTENSIVE INDUCTION CHEMOTHERAPY AND ARE NOT ABLE TO COMPLETE INTENSIVE CURATIVE THERAPY
